strategy: Hit with Death (+5%) and never Life (70% resist). His 75% outgoing healing means bring Infection or Doom and Gloom to cut his self-heals.
Both Feint and Mass Feint make him Cleanse Ward off all his negative wards, so protect your Feint with Indemnity to keep it stuck.
He Polymorphs a random wizard into a Vegetable form at the end of Round 1 and repeatedly after, locking you out of your deck for 15 rounds. Race him and keep pips banked for when you revert.
Stack blades and an Indemnity-Feint early before you risk being polymorphed, then hold your big Death hit for a turn you are in normal form.
Expect multiple cheats in one round (Lamassu, Wings of Fate, Grrnadier at random wizards), so keep shields and heals up through the chaos.
cheatNotes: He often fires several of these cheats in the same round, so expect stacked effects.
Join after Round 2 and he interrupt-casts Grrnadier on you.
Feint or Mass Feint makes him Cleanse Ward all his negative wards off, protect your Feint with Indemnity.
At the end of Round 1 he Polymorphs a random wizard into a Vegetable form for 15 rounds, locking your deck.
He casts Lamassu on a random wizard, a hard hit, keep shields ready.
He casts Wings of Fate on a random wizard.
He casts Grrnadier on a random wizard.
He Polymorphs a random wizard into a Vegetable form.
He simply passes this turn, a free round for you.
He switches an already-polymorphed wizard into a different Vegetable form.
He Polymorphs a random not-yet-polymorphed wizard into a Vegetable form.
